messages.content: Do I need to worry about using Web-Sesame version 2020.1.1.3375?

messages.name: vector_database_retrieval
messages.content:
[CVE-2020-29041]
Severity: MEDIUM
CWE: NVD-CWE-noinfo
Description: A misconfiguration in Web-Sesame 2020.1.1.3375 allows an unauthenticated attacker to download the source code of the application, facilitating its comprehension (code review). Specifically, JavaScript source maps were inadvertently included in the production Webpack configuration. These maps contain sources used to generate the bundle, configuration settings (e.g., API keys), and developers' comments.
Known Vulnerable Software: cpe:2.3:a:sesame-system:web-sesame:2020.1.1.3375:*:*:*:*:*:*:*
Mitigation: M1048, M1037, M1030, M1016, M1026, M1050, M1035, M1051
Vector DB Text: Application 'web-sesame' by sesame-system (version 2020.1.1.3375)
(Relevance Score: 0.7989)

---

[CVE-2021-1280]
Severity: HIGH
CWE: CWE-427
Description: A vulnerability in the loading mechanism of specific DLLs of Cisco Advanced Malware Protection (AMP) for Endpoints for Windows and Immunet for Windows could allow an authenticated, local attacker to perform a DLL hijacking attack. To exploit this vulnerability, the attacker would need valid credentials on the Windows system. This vulnerability is due to incorrect handling of directory search paths at run time. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by placing a malicious DLL file on the targeted system. This file will execute when the vulnerable application launches. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to execute arbitrary code on the targeted system with SYSTEM privileges.
Known Vulnerable Software: cpe:2.3:a:cisco:advanced_malware_protection_for_endpoints:*:*:*:*:*:windows:*:*
Mitigation: M1052, M1040, M1044, M1047, M1013, M1018, M1051, M1038, M1022, M1024
Vector DB Text: Application 'advanced malware protection for endpoints' by cisco on windows (all versions)
(Relevance Score: 0.3692)

---

[CVE-2025-0390]
Severity: HIGH
CWE: CWE-23
Description: A vulnerability classified as critical was found in Guangzhou Huayi Intelligent Technology Jeewms up to 20241229. This vulnerability affects unknown code of the file /wmOmNoticeHController.do. The manipulation leads to path traversal: '../filedir'. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 20250101 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.
Known Vulnerable Software: cpe:2.3:a:huayi-tec:jeewms:*:*:*:*:*:*:*:*
Mitigation: M1048, M1037, M1030, M1016, M1026, M1050, M1035, M1051
Vector DB Text: Application 'jeewms' by huayi-tec (all versions)
(Relevance Score: 0.3643)

[CVE-2025-0391]
Severity: HIGH
CWE: CWE-74
Description: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, has been found in Guangzhou Huayi Intelligent Technology Jeewms up to 20241229. This issue affects the function saveOrUpdate of the file org/jeecgframework/web/cgform/controller/build/CgFormBuildController. java. The manipulation leads to sql injection. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 20250101 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.
Known Vulnerable Software: cpe:2.3:a:huayi-tec:jeewms:*:*:*:*:*:*:*:*
Mitigation: M1048, M1037, M1030, M1016, M1026, M1050, M1035, M1051

[CVE-2025-0392]
Severity: HIGH
CWE: CWE-74
Description: A vulnerability, which was classified as critical, was found in Guangzhou Huayi Intelligent Technology Jeewms up to 20241229. Affected is the function datagridGraph of the file /graphReportController.do. The manipulation of the argument store_code leads to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. Upgrading to version 20250101 is able to address this issue. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component.

Based on the results from your query regarding Web-Sesame version 2020.1.1.3375, here's the analysis:

### Relevant Vulnerability:
- **[CVE-2020-29041]**
  - **Severity:** Medium
  - **Description:** There is a misconfiguration vulnerability present in Web-Sesame 2020.1.1.3375. This issue allows unauthorized attackers to download the application's source code due to the inclusion of JavaScript source maps in the production environment. These source maps can reveal sensitive information such as API keys and developer comments, which could facilitate further exploitation or attacks.
  - **Mitigation:** To mitigate this vulnerability, ensure that source maps are removed from production builds. Standard mitigation strategies include regularly reviewing and securing configuration settings, employing obfuscation techniques, and following secure software development practices.

### Importance for Your Query:
The vulnerability identified directly affects Web-Sesame version 2020.1.1.3375, making it a relevant concern for your usage of this software. Although the severity is rated as medium, the potential for exposing sensitive information and configuration details warrants attention. Removing source maps from production and ensuring proper configuration are key steps in mitigating this risk.

### Irrelevant Findings:
The other vulnerabilities listed (CVE-2021-1280 and CVEs related to Guangzhou Huayi's Jeewms software) do not pertain to Web-Sesame and have no impact on your specific query or version. Therefore, they can be disregarded in this context.

Overall, it is advisable to address the identified issue in Web-Sesame to protect against potential exploitation.
